silhouette: Simple quiet droplet silhouette with a fatter body and the top leaning left, preserving understated asymmetry.
face: Minimal features with two fully open round black dot eyes with tiny white highlights, restrained smile, and low-drama expression.
do_not_change: Keep the minimalist readability and left-leaning top.
Do not over-cute or over-emote by default.
Do not draw half-lidded eyes, sleepy droopy eyes, eyelids, narrowed side-eye, angled angry eyes, brows, or tired/unimpressed expression lines.
Preserve the fatter, quieter silhouette than the other droplets.
Keep exactly two small connected feet in full-body views; never add a third foot, extra leg nub, shoe, toe, paw, or detached lower appendage.
Do not stretch Snacri into a tall narrow droplet; preserve the round, cute, compact model-sheet body.
Do not straighten her into Muci, sharpen her into Nia, energize her into Padaruna, or soften her into Padarana.
